docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, LEONA M.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAEHWILER, MARTIN, SR. GAEHWILER, MARTIN JR. AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, LEONA M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL (CIVIL COVER SHEET) FILED BY PLTF.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAEHWILER, MARTIN, SR. GAEHWILER, MARTIN JR. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-01-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, LEONA M. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, LEONA M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, LEONA M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 TURK STREET #619, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,050.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED ON COND DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS: $555 FORTHWITH (RECPT ACKNOWLEDGED BY PLTF), $1160 BY 10-10-96, & PMNT OF NOV RENT OF $360 ON/BEF 11-5-96; $235 ON/BEF 12-15-96. SEE JUDGMENT. IF PMT NOT MADE, PLTF MAY EXEC ON WRIT W/24HRS WRITTEN NOTICE TO DFT COUNSEL & DECLARATION TO COURT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DEPT#8, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. CLERK - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. & DEF. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT ON FOLLOWING TERMS - RESITUTION OF PREMISES 351 TURK, ST, #619, S.F, CA. - $1,050 RENT & DAMAGES - $400 ATTY FEES - $135 COSTS - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED UNDER FOLLOWING PMT SCHEDULE ( DEF TO PAY $550 TODAY, $1,160 10-10-96 BY 5PM & $235 BY 12-15-96, 5PM WITH CASHIERS CHECKS TO OASIS APTS) - IF DEF FAILS ON ANY PMTS PL. MAY BY ATTY DECL. W/48 HRS NOTICE TO DEF. HAVE JUDGMENT FOR PREMISES - IF DEF. COMPLIES W/ALL TERMS PL. WILL FILE SATISFACTIN OF JUDGMENT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
